dtsPropsFor.Button: /** Visual style. @default 'filled' */ variant?: 'text' | 'filled'; /** Semantic color; 'error' renders the destructive style. */ color?: 'error'; children?: React.ReactNode; type?: 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset'; disabled?: boolean; onClick?: React.MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>; className?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties;
dtsPropsFor.Chip: /** Chip label text. */ text: string; /** Pill background color (hex/CSS color). Defaults to #e8eef7. */ backgroundColor?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties; className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.Dialog: /** When true the modal renders into a portal on document.body. */ open: boolean; /** Called on backdrop click. */ onClose?: () => void; /** Dialog body content. */ children?: React.ReactNode; className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.Divider: /** Horizontal rule; spreads standard <hr> HTML attributes. */ className?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties;
dtsPropsFor.IconButton: /** Icon node rendered inside a circular 40x40 button. */ children: React.ReactNode; /** Fired on click. */ onClick?: (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => void; disabled?: boolean; className?: string; 'aria-label'?: string;
dtsPropsFor.Paper: /** Surface content. */ children?: React.ReactNode; /** Extra class merged onto the white/elevated container. */ className?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties;
dtsPropsFor.Progress: /** Percentage filled, clamped 0-100. */ value: number; /** Fill bar color. Defaults to #2196F3. */ color?: string; /** Track color. Defaults to #E0E0E0. */ backgroundColor?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties; className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.FeatureCard: /** Icon node shown in the card header (e.g. a lucide-react icon). */ icon: React.ReactNode; /** Card heading. */ title: string; /** Supporting body copy. */ description: string; /** Accent color applied to the top border, any CSS color. */ color: string;
dtsPropsFor.TestimonialCard: /** The testimonial body text. */ description: string; /** Author's name; its first letter is shown in the avatar. */ name: string; /** Author's role or company. */ appointment: string;
dtsPropsFor.LessonMaterials: /** Downloadable materials for the lesson; renders nothing when empty. */ materials: { id: number; name: string; /** Chooses the file-type icon. */ type: 'pdf' | 'presentation' | 'image' | 'archive' | 'other'; /** Human-readable file size, e.g. '1.2 MB'. */ size?: string; /** Download/href target. */ url: string; }[];
dtsPropsFor.LessonNavigation: /** Title of the current lesson. */ lessonTitle: string; /** 1-based index of the current lesson. */ currentLesson: number; /** Total lessons in the module. */ totalLessons: number; /** Go to previous lesson; auto-disables on the first lesson. */ onPrevious?: () => void; /** Go to next lesson; auto-disables on the last lesson. */ onNext?: () => void;
dtsPropsFor.LessonItem: /** All fields optional (Partial<Lesson>); only name is rendered. */ id?: number; /** Lesson title shown in the Paper. */ name?: string; description?: string | null; /** Duration in seconds. */ duration?: number; status?: 'public' | 'private'; videoURL?: string; createdAt?: Date; updatedAt?: Date;
dtsPropsFor.ContactDialog: /** Controls dialog visibility; render true to show contact info. */ open: boolean; /** Called when the dialog is dismissed. */ onClose: () => void;
dtsPropsFor.DeleteDialog: /** Controls dialog visibility. */ open: boolean; /** Confirm destructive action (the red 'Да' button). */ onDelete: () => void; /** Cancel / dismiss (the 'Нет' button). */ onBack: () => void;
dtsPropsFor.AddSkillModal: /** Controls modal visibility. */ isOpen: boolean; /** Dismiss the modal. */ onClose: () => void; /** Submit a new skill name; resolves with a success flag and optional error. */ onAdd: (name: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>;
dtsPropsFor.VideoModal: /** Source URL of the video played in the modal. */ videoSrc: string; /** Trigger button label. @default 'Узнать больше' */ buttonText?: string; /** Class applied to the trigger button. */ buttonClassName?: string;
dtsPropsFor.LessonForm: /** Heading shown above the form. */ title: string; /** Native form submit handler. */ handleSubmit: (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => void; /** Field-level validation errors, keyed by field name. */ errors?: { properties?: Record<string, { errors?: string }> }; /** Disables the submit button and shows a loading label. */ isLoading?: boolean; /** Existing lesson to edit; absent for a new lesson. */ data?: { name?: string; videoURL?: string; status?: 'public' | 'private'; description?: string }; /** Upload progress for the video file. */ progress: { percentage: number; loaded: number; total: number };
dtsPropsFor.Breadcrumbs: /** Trail items in order; the last renders as the current (non-link) page. A leading Home icon linking to the dashboard is always prepended. */ items: { label: string; href: string }[];
dtsPropsFor.SettingBlock: /** Card heading. */ title: string; /** Setting rows. A row with navigate renders as a link with a chevron; without it, a static label/value pair. */ rows: { navigate?: string; text1: string; text2: string }[];
dtsPropsFor.Aside: /** Course whose module/lesson tree is listed. */ course: { id: number; name: string; modules: { order: number; module: { id: number; name: string; lessons: { order: number; lesson: { id: number; name: string } }[] } }[] }; /** Completion percent 0-100 for the header progress bar. */ progress?: number; /** Ids of completed lessons (shown with a check). */ completedLessonIds?: Set<number>;
dtsPropsFor.CourseCard: /** Course title. */ name?: string; /** Short summary. */ description?: string | null; /** Course id (used for the enroll/continue link). */ id?: number; /** Number of modules. */ moduleCount?: number; /** Number of lessons. */ lessonCount?: number; /** Progress; when present the CTA becomes 'Продолжить курс' and a bar is shown. */ progress?: { completed: number; total: number; percentage: number }; /** Optional explicit link override. */ link?: string;
dtsPropsFor.LessonCard: /** Lesson title. */ name: string; /** Short summary (nullable). */ description?: string | null; /** Lesson id (used for the watch link). */ id: number; /** Duration in seconds; rendered as mm:ss. */ duration: number; /** When true the CTA becomes 'Продолжить' instead of 'Смотреть'. */ progress?: boolean;
dtsPropsFor.Navbar: /** Current user; when role is manager/admin, management tabs appear. Omit for a guest. */ user?: { id: string; email: string; role: 'user' | 'manager' | 'admin' };
dtsPropsFor.CourseTable: /** Rows to render (course records). */ data: { id: number; name: string; description: string | null; program: string | null; privacy: 'private' | 'public'; showOnLanding: boolean; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date }[]; /** Called with the course id to delete. */ handleDelete: (id: number) => void; /** Show the red delete button (default true). */ canDelete?: boolean;
dtsPropsFor.ModuleTable: /** Rows to render (module records). */ data: { id: number; name: string; description: string | null; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date }[]; /** Called with the module id to delete. */ handleDelete: (id: number) => void; /** Show the red delete button (default true). */ canDelete?: boolean;
dtsPropsFor.UsersTable: /** Rows to render (users with subscription). */ data: { id: string; email: string; role: 'user' | 'manager' | 'admin'; subscription: { id: number; type: 'Ознакомительная' | 'Все включено'; endedAt: Date; userId: string } }[];
dtsPropsFor.LessonTable: /** Rows to render (lesson records). */ data: { id: number; name: string; description: string | null; duration: number; status: 'public' | 'private'; videoURL: string; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date }[]; /** Called when the edit button is clicked. */ handleChange: (id: number) => void; /** Called when the attach-materials button is clicked. */ handleAttach: (id: number) => void; /** Called with the lesson id to delete. */ handleDelete: (id: number) => void; /** Show the red delete button (default true). */ canDelete?: boolean;
dtsPropsFor.ModuleForm: /** All lessons available to add to the module. */ lessons: { id: number; name: string; description: string | null; duration: number; status: 'public' | 'private'; videoURL: string; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date }[]; /** Existing module to prefill (edit mode); omit for create. */ module?: { id: number; name: string; description: string | null; lessons: { order: number; lesson: { id: number; name: string } }[] }; /** Heading text. */ title: string; /** Submit button label. */ submitButtonText: string; /** Persist handler. */ onSubmit: (data: { name: string; description?: string; lessons: { lessonId: number; order: number }[] }) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>;
